mapper.sql: id, server_task_id, idempotency_key, callback_status, process_status, error_summary, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM processing_callback callback_record WHERE callback_record.process_status = 'processing' AND callback_record.create_time < #{cutoff} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM processing_task task WHERE task.server_task_id = callback_record.server_task_id AND task.task_type = 'fund_catalog_refresh' AND task.status IN ('created', 'dispatched', 'running') ) ORDER BY callback_record.id ASC
